description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped lot surrounded by a low boundary wall. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with flat roofs, large windows, and several outdoor terraces and balconies. The property includes a driveway, a detached garage or auxiliary building, and a well-defined garden area with numerous trees and shrubs. The main building is characterized by clean lines, a predominantly white or light exterior, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. There are several entry points, with the primary entrance marked by a pathway and a more formal approach. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A large, modern house with flat roofs, expansive windows, and landscaped gardens, set within a walled urban lot. The design features multiple levels, terraces, and a detached garage.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade, entry pathway, and a prominent terrace area, with landscaped gardens and trees framing the house.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear garden, auxiliary building, and a more private side of the house are visible, with dense tree coverage along the boundary.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the house's side elevation, the garage structure, and a large open lawn area, emphasizing the building's depth and layered design.
description_view_3: This view reveals the opposite side of the house, with additional terraces, garden features, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide pathway, minimal steps, and a simple, modern door with an overhang and landscaped approach
